purpose: Define canonical authority hierarchy for federation repos

sovereign.authority: sovereign purpose, constitutional amendment, final irreversible approval

arifos.authority: constitutional floors, authority, verdicts, runtime enforcement, routing, audit

a-forge.authority: bounded execution, verification, rollback, engineering planning, simulation

aaa.authority: state, registry, coordination, display, observability, identity, A2A gateway

geox.authority: domain evidence, earth intelligence, petrophysics, prospect evaluations

wealth.authority: capital and economic intelligence, NPV/IRR/EMV, stock analysis

well.authority: human readiness, vitality metrics, sleep/fatigue signals (REFLECT_ONLY)

vault999.authority: immutable audit memory, provenance, replay, institutional memory

boundary_rules: No organ may seal without arifOS
Engineering requires arifOS SEAL → A-FORGE execute
arifOS does not directly perform engineering mutation
Domain organs provide evidence, not decisions
